system.description:
Many weapons require larger ammunition sources to function during extended battles. A backpack supply fits over the standard backpack power unit on Astartes power armour. For flame weapons, the supply consists of volatile fuel tanks. A weapon connected to a backpack supply uses that supply for its ammunition and ignores its normal clip size. Backpack Ammo/Power supplies weigh 40 kg and are automatically issued with any heavy weapon.

Used With: Flame weapons.
